description_long: This is an adult woman depicted in a standing pose with arms extended horizontally to the sides. She is dressed in a long-sleeved, fitted top with a deep neckline and a knee-length skirt, both of which appear to be layered and slightly textured. Her feet are positioned close together, and she is wearing heeled shoes. The figure's hair is styled up in a neat bun, and her facial features are clearly defined. The clothing fits closely to the body, suggesting a casual yet tidy urban appearance. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall form is realistic and proportionate.
description: A standing adult woman with arms outstretched, wearing a fitted top, knee-length skirt, and heeled shoes, with hair styled in a bun.
description_view_0: Front view showing the woman's face, deep neckline, and full arm extension.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, bun hairstyle, and the layered skirt.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, bun, and the fit of the top and skirt.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm, and the drape of the skirt.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeved fitted top with deep neckline and knee-length skirt
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: hair styled in a neat bun
